summary: Completed full translation audit for CryptoNai React Native/Expo mentor marketplace application. All translation keys exist for FR, EN, ES. All tested pages use useTranslation hook. No hardcoded French text in Alert.alert calls in the specified components.

issues: Password hint text ('Au moins 6 caractères', 'Les mots de passe correspondent') not using t() function at lines 387-397 in settings/index.tsx
Profile edit modal has hardcoded French strings: 'Modifier le profil', 'Changer la photo', 'Nom complet', 'Votre nom', 'Enregistrer' at lines 427-467

action_items: Fix hardcoded French strings in settings/index.tsx profile edit modal (lines 427-467)
Fix hardcoded French strings in settings/index.tsx password hints (lines 387-397)
critical_code_review_comments: Translation count: FR=1660 keys, EN=1598 keys, ES=1551 keys - EN/ES may be missing some newer keys

All specified files (marketplace/index.tsx, content/[id].tsx, success.tsx, vip/purchases.tsx, QuizPlayer.tsx, NotificationCenter.tsx, ReportModal.tsx, admin.tsx, settings/index.tsx) correctly import and use useTranslation from languageStore

success_rate.frontend: 95% - minor hardcoded strings in settings modal

context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation audit completed. All major pages tested: marketplace, purchases, settings, admin, notifications, quiz, report modal. Translation keys for marketplace, purchaseContent, purchaseSuccess, purchases, quiz, notifications, report, admin, settings sections exist in translations.ts for all 3 languages (FR, EN, ES). Minor issue: settings/index.tsx has some hardcoded French strings in the profile edit modal and password hints that should be converted to t() calls.

translation_audit_results.useTranslation_import: All files import and use useTranslation from languageStore
translation_audit_results.alert_calls_check: All Alert.alert() calls in tested files use t() for translations
